case_title: PACIFIC REGIONAL GROUP, INC. VS. BONNIE O BRIEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC REGIONAL GROUP, INC.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC REGIONAL GROUP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O BRIEN, BONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFT. VACATED THE PROPERTY PER STIP. FOR ENTRY FILED ON 7/9/02. $2,158.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,158.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PACIFIC REGIONAL GROUP, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC REGIONAL GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT O BRIEN, BONNIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION; FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UPON A BREACH; FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC REGIONAL GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT O BRIEN, BONNIE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF
